fixesApplied: Changed .ledger-amount--credit color from var(--ink) to var(--mpesa-text) for green credit amounts
Changed .ledger-scroll-container from max-height to height for consistent viewport fill

principles.name: Think Before Coding
principles.notes: 8-phase plan created and sequenced before implementation; 3 plan JSONs + CONTEXT artifacts

principles.name: Simplicity First
principles.notes: Single Ledger component with TanStack Virtual; no unnecessary abstractions

principles.name: Surgical Changes
principles.notes: Only Ledger page + backend filtering changed; CSS uplift limited to token consistency

principles.name: Goal-Driven Execution
principles.notes: tsc + build verified at every step; all 3 plan verify commands pass

principles.name: Prefer shared utility packages over hand-rolled helpers
principles.notes: @tanstack/react-virtual for virtualization; shared Select/DatePicker components reused

principles.name: Don't probe data YOLO-style
principles.notes: TypeScript types match backend DTOs; JPA Specification chain uses typed predicates

principles.name: Validate boundaries
principles.notes: Backend validates filter params via @RequestParam types; frontend debounces input; error states handled

principles.name: Typed SDKs
principles.notes: Using @tanstack/react-virtual typed API; Spring Data JPA Specification<JournalEntry> generics
